allow: Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 ubuntu@54.95.105.90 "echo ''SSH OK'' && python3 --version && ls /opt/apps/ 2>/dev/null")
Bash(ssh ubuntu@54.95.105.90 "cat /etc/nginx/conf.d/apps/*.conf 2>/dev/null || echo ''not found''; ls /etc/nginx/conf.d/ 2>/dev/null; ls /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/ 2>/dev/null")

Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 ubuntu@54.95.105.90 "sudo grep -r ''webanalizar'' /etc/nginx/ --include=''*.conf'' -l 2>/dev/null; ls /etc/nginx/conf.d/ /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/ 2>/dev/null")
Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 ubuntu@54.95.105.90 "sudo grep -r ''webanalizar'' /etc/nginx/ -l 2>/dev/null; cat /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/tools")
Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 ubuntu@54.95.105.90 "ls -la /opt/apps/webanalizar/static/ && systemctl is-active webanalizar")
Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 ubuntu@54.95.105.90 "sudo systemctl restart webanalizar && sleep 2 && curl -sv http://127.0.0.1:3108/static/style.css 2>&1 | head -20")

Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 ubuntu@54.95.105.90 "curl -s http://127.0.0.1:3108/webanalizar/static/style.css | head -5; echo ''---''; curl -s -o /dev/null -w ''%{http_code}'' http://127.0.0.1:3108/webanalizar/static/style.css")
